semantic.role: Public facade module for prompt generation and builder composition. It re-exports prompt assembly functions and the PromptBuilder class from internal submodules to provide a stable entrypoint for downstream consumers within the infrastructure layer.
responsibilities: Re-export PromptBuilder, a fluent builder class for constructing prompts programmatically.
Re-export generateConfigPrompt, generateDocumentPrompt, generateFolderPrompt, and generateProjectPrompt from the aggregate module for generating prompts for different document types.
Re-export generateMarkdownPrompt for producing prompts in Markdown format.
Re-export generateSourcePrompt for generating prompts targeting source code files with AST and rule context.
Provide a single stable import surface that isolates consumers from internal prompt submodule restructuring.
outOfScope: Actual prompt rendering logic, tokenization, or formatting.
Prompt policy enforcement, budgeting, or trimming.
LLM interaction, authentication, or credential management.
Internal submodules (builder.ts, aggregate.ts, markdown.ts, source.ts) which are implementation details hidden behind this facade.
invariants: This module must only contain re-export statements and a file header; it must not implement any logic.
The set of exported symbols should remain stable across releases to honor the facade contract.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Establish a stable public facade for prompt assembly, decoupling prompt consumers from the internal organization of prompt submodules within the infra layer.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Reflects accumulated source changes as part of a release gate fix and source sync. No semantic change to the public contract of this facade.

publicSurface.description: Class for composing prompts using a fluent builder pattern. Called by higher-level prompt assembly workflows to construct structured prompts.
Generates a prompt for a Spine configuration file, incorporating relevant rules and context. Used by the prompt rendering pipeline when processing config files.
Generates a prompt for a documentation file, incorporating relevant rules and context. Used by the prompt rendering pipeline when processing documentation.
Generates a prompt for a folder index document, summarizing its structure and contents. Used in folder-level aggregation.
Generates a prompt for project-level summary or analysis based on project-wide rules and state. Used in project-level aggregations.
Generates a prompt rendered in Markdown format, used for human-readable output such as view pages or reports.
Generates a prompt for a source code file, incorporating AST data, rules, and usage context. Consumed by the per-file prompt generation pipeline.
